 In this role, you will take an active part in establishing and maturing Atea’s data governance capabilities. You will work closely with both business stakeholders and technical teams, ensuring that data is managed as a strategic asset across the organization.
 



  





 You will not only define frameworks and standards but also support their implementation and continuous improvement in real operational contexts. The role requires both strategic thinking and hands-on execution, where you act as a bridge between business needs and data platform capabilities.
 



  





 Your responsibilities will include:
 


* Establishing and maintaining data governance frameworks, processes, and standards
* Driving the implementation of data ownership and stewardship across the organization
* Developing and maintaining information models aligned with business requirements
* Ensuring structured metadata management, including classification, cataloging, and lineage
* Working with tools such as Microsoft Purview and supporting governance within Microsoft Fabric
* Ensuring compliance with relevant regulations such as GDPR and ISO 27001
* Defining and following up on processes for data quality and lifecycle management
* Measuring governance maturity and driving continuous improvements
* Supporting and strengthening data literacy within the organization



  





 You will collaborate with stakeholders across business domains such as finance, logistics, and sales, as well as IT, data platform teams, and information security. The work is closely connected to ongoing transformation initiatives where structured and reliable data is critical for success.
 



  





**What We Are Looking For** 




 We are looking for someone who combines strong data expertise with a sharp analytical mindset and clear business understanding. You are comfortable navigating complex data environments, able to identify patterns, priorities, and improvement areas, and turn them into concrete actions that strengthen data quality and governance. You work in a structured way, keep momentum over time, and ensure that initiatives move from idea to implementation while always keeping focus on how data creates measurable business value.
 



  





 You likely have experience working with data governance, data management, or information architecture, and have been involved in initiatives where data structure, compliance, and quality have been central.
 



  





 We believe you have:
 


* Experience from working with data governance, data management, or similar roles
* A solid understanding of information modeling and data quality practices
* Experience with metadata management, data catalogues, or similar solutions
* Experience working with modern data platforms (e.g., Microsoft Fabric or equivalent)
* Knowledge of regulatory frameworks such as GDPR and ISO 27001
* Experience collaborating across both business and IT functions



  





 It is considered an advantage if you also have experience from:
 


* Tools such as Microsoft Purview, Power BI, or similar
* ERP environments, especially SAP/S4HANA
* Azure or other modern cloud-based data platforms
* Agile ways of working or change management initiatives



  





**About Atea** 




 Atea is the leading supplier of IT infrastructure in the Nordic and Baltic regions. Atea is present in 88 cities with over 8,000 employees in Norway, Sweden, Denmark, Finland, Lithuania, Latvia, and Estonia. Atea delivers hardware and software from leading global vendors and provides consulting and technical services to support its customers with the design, implementation, and operation of their IT environments. Atea had gross sales of approximately 60 billion NOK i gross sales (2025) and is listed on Oslo Stock Exchange.
 



  





**Apply and become part of our journey!** 




 Applications are handled continuously.
 



  





 Please contact Tobias Forss, Head of Data Platform and Governance, at tobias.forss@atea.se for further information about the role.
 



  





 As part of Atea’s recruitment process, background checks are included. Atea wants to be The Place To Be as we value and work actively with diversity and inclusion. We welcome your application!
 



**Följ oss i sociala medier**

title: Senior Infrastrukturarkitekt
description:
Brinner du för modern IT-infrastruktur och vill vara med och forma framtidens tekniska plattform? Vi söker nu en IT-arkitekt inom Infrastruktur som vill ta en nyckelroll i utvecklingen av komplexa och verksamhetskritiska IT-miljöer. Här får du kombinera strategiskt tänkande med operativt arbete i en miljö präglad av samarbete, kunskapsdelning och teknisk utveckling.
 



  





 Som IT-arkitekt hos vår kund i Järfälla kommer du att arbeta nära andra arkitekter och specialister i både team och individuella uppdrag. Du får möjlighet att utvecklas tillsammans med engagerade och erfarna kollegor i en organisation som värdesätter innovation, lärande och kompetensutveckling.
 



  





 Tjänsten börjar som ett konsultuppdrag där ambitionen är att anställningen senare ska gå över till vår kund.
 



  





 Som konsult på Eccera får du en trygg anställning och samlar på dig värdefull arbetslivserfarenhet på uppdrag hos våra kunder. Din konsultchef stöttar dig i din utveckling där du hela tiden fyller på med nya erfarenheter och kunskaper. En utmärkt möjlighet att göra karriär.
 



  





**Dina arbetsuppgifter** 




 Du kommer att vara delaktig i att designa och utveckla framtidens tekniska plattformar. Du arbetar nära verksamheten, service managers, tekniska specialister och andra arkitekter för att säkerställa att IT-lösningar utformas enligt verksamhetskrav, regulatoriska krav och etablerade arkitekturprinciper.
 



  





 Du kommer att ha en central roll i att skapa hållbara och effektiva infrastrukturlösningar samt bidra med teknisk rådgivning och beslutsunderlag i strategiska frågor.
 



  





*Exempel på arbetsuppgifter:* 



* Analysera verksamhetskrav och behovsbilder
* Designa och ta fram lösningsförslag inom infrastrukturområdet
* Stötta service managers och service owners som teknisk sakkunnig
* Ta fram beslutsunderlag för både affärsmässiga och tekniska vägval
* Säkerställa att lagar, regler, processer, standarder och policies efterlevs
* Dokumentera tekniska lösningar och arkitekturer
* Presentera och kommunicera lösningar till olika målgrupper och forum



  





**Din profil** 




 Vi söker dig som trivs i en roll där du får växla mellan helhetsperspektiv och tekniska detaljer. Du är kommunikativ, självgående och har lätt för att förklara komplexa tekniska lösningar för olika typer av målgrupper. Du uppskattar att arbeta i team där kunskapsdelning och samarbete är en naturlig del av vardagen.
 



  





 Du har tidigare erfarenhet inom infrastrukturområdet och ett genuint intresse för säkerhet, arkitektur och moderna IT-miljöer.
 



  





*Krav:* 



* Minst 8–10 års erfarenhet inom IT-infrastruktur, varav flera år i en ledande eller uttalad arkitektroll
* Djup teknisk kompetens inom komplexa infrastrukturlösningar och enterprise-miljöer
* Gedigen erfarenhet av att designa och implementera lösningar i större On-premises-, hybrid- och Cloud-miljöer
* Erfarenhet av strategiskt arkitekturarbete och tekniska vägval i större organisationer
* Mycket god förståelse för IT-säkerhet, regulatoriska krav och styrande ramverk
* Dokumenterad erfarenhet av att ta fram tekniska beslutsunderlag och driva arkitekturfrågor
* Van att kommunicera tekniska lösningar med både tekniska och verksamhetsnära intressenter
* Mycket goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska, både i tal och skrift



  





 Uppdraget omfattas av försvarssekretess vilket sätter kvar på arbete på plats fem dagar i veckan. Säkerhetsprövningssamtal och bakgrundskontroll kommer att genomföras. Svenskt medborgarskap är ett krav.
 



  





**Vad vi erbjuder** 




 På Eccera får du de verktyg du behöver för att nå dina mål. Vi erbjuder alla våra konsulter kvalificerade utbildningar och certifieringar inom den senaste tekniken. Vi sätter stort värde på att våra medarbetare hela tiden ska fortsätta att utvecklas. Därför erbjuder vi dig möjligheten att lägga upp en individuell utbildningsplan, där vi bekostar såväl studiematerial som själva certifieringarna. Under din utveckling kommer vi matcha din kompetens mot rätt uppdrag i takt med att du avancerar.

title: Software Architect - Mobile
description:
**About Air Apps**
 At Air Apps, we believe in thinking bigger- and moving faster. We’re a family-founded company on a mission to create the world’s first AI-powered Personal & Entrepreneurial Resource Planner (PRP), and we need your passion and ambition to help us change how people plan, work, and live. Born in Lisbon, Portugal, in 2018 - and now with offices in both Lisbon and San Francisco - we’ve remained self-funded while reaching over 100 million downloads worldwide.
   

  

 Our long-term focus drives us to challenge the status quo every day, pushing the boundaries of AI-driven solutions that truly make a difference. Here, you’ll be a creative force, shaping products that empower people across the globe.
   

  

 Join us on this journey to redefine resource management - and change lives along the way.
   

  

* This is a fully onsite position, based at our office in Lisbon, where you will collaborate closely with cross-functional teams in person and contribute to a dynamic and fast-paced environment. We are open to support with relocation efforts.


**The Role**
 As a
 **Mobile Software Architect** 
 at Air Apps, you will take the lead in designing scalable and performant mobile architecture for our suite of applications - primarily focused on iOS, with cross-functional knowledge of Android development considered a plus.
   

  

 You will collaborate with product, design, and engineering teams to craft elegant and efficient solutions that support millions of users globally. This is a strategic and technical leadership role where your decisions will influence the long-term evolution of our mobile ecosystem.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Define and lead the mobile architecture strategy, ensuring a scalable and maintainable foundation across projects.
* Focus primarily on iOS architecture, libraries, and platform-specific patterns, while maintaining an understanding of Android frameworks.
* Collaborate with engineers, designers, and product managers to ensure architectural decisions align with product goals and user experience.
* Establish and enforce coding standards, design patterns, and performance guidelines.
* Lead architectural reviews and provide guidance on refactoring and scaling existing mobile applications.
* Design APIs, SDKs, and modular components that can be reused across teams.
* Guide decisions around third-party libraries, mobile tooling, and build/deployment pipelines.
* Partner with backend and cloud teams to ensure seamless integration between mobile apps and services.
* Stay current with the latest trends and best practices in mobile architecture, performance, and security.
* Mentor mobile engineers and help elevate the team’s technical proficiency.


**Requirements**
* Around 6+ years of experience in mobile development with a strong architectural mindset.
* Deep expertise in iOS development using Swift (Objective-C knowledge is a plus).
* Solid understanding of UIKit, SwiftUI, Combine, and other modern iOS frameworks.
* Experience with app performance optimization, modularization, and offline-first strategies.
* Familiarity with Android development (Kotlin/Java) is a strong plus.
* Experience integrating with APIs, handling mobile data storage, caching, and background tasks.
* Strong knowledge of App Store submission, mobile security, and compliance guidelines.
* Experience with mobile CI/CD pipelines, testing frameworks, and deployment automation.
* Strong communication skills and the ability to explain architectural concepts to both technical and non-technical team members.
* Passion for clean code, design patterns (MVVM, VIPER, etc.), and scalable architecture.


**What benefits do we offer?**
* Apple hardware ecosystem for work.
* Annual Bonus
* Top-tier Health and Life Insurance for peace of mind.
* Transportation Budget to support your commute needs.
* Coverflex benefits package for meal allowances, well-being, and more.
* Childcare support.
* Air Conference - an opportunity to meet the team, collaborate, and grow together.
* Pension Fund to support your long-term financial planning.
* Urban Sports Club membership to keep you active.
* Meals 100% free at the hub.


**Diversity & Inclusion**
 At Air Apps, we are committed to fostering a diverse, inclusive, and equitable workplace. We enthusiastically welcome applicants from all backgrounds, experiences, and perspectives. We celebrate diversity in all its forms and believe that varied voices and experiences make us stronger.
   

  

**Application Disclaimer**
 At Air Apps, we value transparency and integrity in our hiring process. Applicants must submit their own work without any AI-generated assistance. Any use of AI in application materials, assessments, or interviews will result in disqualification.

title: Senior Software Engineer - Promotions & Campaigns
description:
**Join our highly skilled team of developers - breaking new ground and shaping the future of retail.** 




  





**We dare to dream big, we have the courage to keep raising the bar, and we’re committed to being a force for good in retail - helping both established and fast-growing brands meet the ever-changing expectations of their customers.** 




  





**Sitoo is a fast-growing technology company exploring how far we can take innovation to deliver the world’s best Unified Commerce Platform and Point of Sale. Our technology is used in more than 20 countries - a number that keeps growing thanks to our incredible team of engineers. And we have no intention of slowing down. Are you the Senior Software Engineer we’re looking for?** 




  





**Your mission at Sitoo** 




  





 As a Senior Software Engineer at Sitoo , you’ll be part of a small, autonomous team responsible for backend services that power our platform. This is not a role where you “hand over” code - you design, build, deploy, operate, and improve your services end-to-end.
 



  





 A big part of your work will be making thoughtful technical decisions: choosing the right patterns, improving system architecture, and ensuring that what we build is reliable, scalable, and maintainable over time. You’ll work primarily in AWS, using modern practices such as infrastructure as code, automated testing, and CI/CD to deliver quickly without compromising quality.
 



  





 You’ll also play an important role in how we evolve as an engineering organization - contributing to best practices, raising the bar for reliability and observability, and helping the team make sound trade-offs.
 



  





**About the team** 




  





 Team PromoStock, Promotion & Campaigns, powers the two biggest drivers of retail success: dynamic promotions and real-time inventory. We are a cross-functional team that turns messy logistics into scalable software, syncing stock and executing complex campaigns across physical and digital stores. We prioritize shipping practical solutions over over-engineering. If you want to build fast, intuitive tools that have an immediate impact in the physical world, we’d love to have you on the team.
 



  





**What you’ll work with** 




  





 In this role, you’ll design and operate low-latency backend services, working across both synchronous APIs and asynchronous, event-driven systems. You’ll integrate with internal and third-party systems, and ensure that services behave well under real-world load.
 



  





 You’ll continuously improve how systems perform in production - reducing latency, increasing resilience, and strengthening observability through logging, metrics, and alerting. When incidents happen, you take part in understanding root causes and driving long-term fixes, not just quick patches.
 



  





 Security and efficiency are also part of the job: building systems with least-privilege access, secure defaults, and a conscious approach to AWS cost and performance.
 



  





**What you bring to the table** 




  





 You are an experienced engineer who takes ownership beyond just writing code. You care about how systems behave in production and continuously look for ways to improve them. Therefore, we believe that you have:
 



  




* Strong backend development experience with Node.js or similar
* Proven experience building scalable and reliable cloud services
* Solid understanding of distributed systems and asynchronous architectures
* Experience with infrastructure as code and modern CI/CD practices
* Experience designing and integrating APIs
* A product-oriented mindset with a focus on real user value



  





 Just as importantly, you bring a strong sense of ownership. You approach problems in a structured and pragmatic way, communicate clearly, and collaborate well with others. You care about building systems that not only work today, but continue to work tomorrow.
 



  





**Bonus points** 




  





 Experience with AWS services such as SQS, SNS, DynamoDB, Lambda, or Aurora will help you get up to speed quickly, as will familiarity with Docker or Kubernetes in production environments. If you’ve worked with high-traffic or low-latency systems, or have experience with identity, access management, or security in CI/CD pipelines, that’s a plus.
 



  





**Why Sitoo** 




  





 We are forward thinkers. By turning curiosity into knowledge - and knowledge into continuous improvement - we break new ground and shape the future of retail.
 



 We believe in an inclusive culture where everyone feels like they belong. We support each other, win together, celebrate success together, and overcome challenges together.
 



 Today, we are close to 115 dedicated experts with a positive and solution-oriented mindset. Most importantly, we take care of each other, and we never forget to have fun.
 



  





*This is a hybrid role based in Stockholm or Gothenburg. Please note that we are currently unable to offer relocation support for this position, so you’ll need to hold a permanent residence permit in Sweden.*

title: System Engineer- ADAS
description:
We are looking for a proactive System Engineer with 5 years of work experience from Driver Information (ADAS) in the automotive industry.
  
  

**Work Description:**  

As a system engineer your main objective is to design and specify software requirements for in-house development teams. You develop interfaces and define signals within driver information system, ensuring seamless integration with existing and future vehicle models. In this role, you will work in a development team responsible for delivering the whole software package of the instrument cluster including functionality. You will work with requirements related to ADAS and in close collaboration with suppliers and stakeholders.
  
  

**Expereince Required:**  

* We believe you are motivated by challenging tasks in a complex and innovative environment. -You can deliver with short ramp up period.
* You enjoy designing solutions in collaboration with your team
* Excellent communication skills and ability to communicate effectively with all types of stakeholders and suppliers.
* You are analytical and a problem-solver
* You have minimum 5 years of work experience from system design in automotive.
* Good knowledge and experience in ADAS technology is therefore a must.
* You will also consider testing when defining requirements – testability and quality assurance that the product meets the quality requirements.
* You enjoy collaboration and knowledge sharing.
* You are self-motivated, curious and passionate about innovation.


**Skills needed:**  

* ADAS experience
* Canoe competence
* Matlab (Simulink/stateflow)
* Experience of joining late in projects and be able to deliver
* Elektra requirement tool
* Experience in writing test reports/DVM
* Fluent in English both spoken and written, Swedish is a plus.
* Valid European driver’s license B
* You are located in Sweden and can work 100% onsite in Gothenburg

title: Test & Verification Engineer
description:
Test & Verification Engineer – Vehicle Connectivity & Embedded Systems
  
We are looking for a skilled and motivated Test & Verification Engineer, focusing on vehicle connectivity and embedded systems. In this role, you will work hands-on with both software and hardware verification, ensuring our solutions meet the highest standards of quality, safety, and performance.
  
You will collaborate closely with developers, suppliers, and workshop stakeholders, contributing to everything from fault tracing and diagnostics to test automation and continuous improvement.
  
What you will do
  
Plan, design, and execute test and verification activities on system and vehicle level
  
Perform end-to-end testing of onboard and offboard connectivity solutions
  
Develop, write, execute, and report test cases based on requirements
  
Work with manual testing in rigs and vehicles, as well as automated testing
  
Perform vehicle diagnostics and fault tracing in rigs, HIL setups, and vehicles
  
Conduct black-box, white-box, acceptance, and regression testing
  
Automate test cases using tools like vTestStudio for HIL, bench, and vehicle testing
  
Monitor and analyze nightly HIL test runs, ensuring quick issue follow-up
  
Perform root cause analysis, log analysis, and signal/actuator measurements
  
Create clear and structured fault reports for development teams and suppliers
  
Collaborate with suppliers, internal teams, and external workshops for testing coordination
  
Contribute to verification strategy, processes, and continuous improvements
  
Ensure quality and readiness before release
  
Tools & Technologies
  
  

**You will work with a modern toolchain including:**  

Vector tools (CANoe, CANalyzer, vTestStudio, INCA)
  
HIL rigs and test benches
  
System Weaver / SystemWeaver
  
Elektra, DSA, INCA
  
Embedded systems, diagnostics tools, and measurement equipment (e.g. oscilloscopes)
  
Experience
  
Experience in manual and automated verification of embedded systems (preferably automotive)
  
Strong experience with vehicle/system rigs and testing environments
  
Knowledge of vehicle diagnostics, fault tracing, and root cause analysis
  
Hands-on experience with Vector toolchain and HIL testing
  
Understanding of electronics and embedded systems (schematics, signals, measurements)
  
Experience with test automation and scripting
  
Familiarity with Simulink is a plus
  
B.Sc. or M.Sc. in Electrical Engineering, Software Engineering, Mechatronics, or similar
  
Fluent in English
  
Valid B driver’s license meriting
  
Who you are
  
Passionate about testing, technology, and quality
  
Analytical, structured, and detail-oriented
  
A team player with a proactive and positive mindset
  
Curious and communicative, with the ability to explain complex issues clearly
  
Self-driven and adaptable, with a T-shaped mindset and willingness to learn new areas

title: Radio System Designer till vårt Accelerate Radio Training Program
description:
**Vår kund försvarsmakten och FMV digitaliserar sitt ledningsstödsystem. Arbetet är långsiktigt och tekniskt avancerat.**

 **Vi på Combitech i Växjö arbetar med att utveckla, underhålla och serva tekniskt avancerade radiokommunikationslösningar. Till detta område behöver vi snabba på och accelerera våra förmågor. Genom att delta i Combitech Accelerate Radio Training Program så blir du snabbare en mer erfaren ingenjör inom det här spännande området.**

 **Vi söker både dig som är nyutexaminerad och dig som har några års erfarenhet. Du kommer få bygga på din tekniska kompetens, din affärsmässighet, personliga ledarskap och ta del av våra erfarna ingenjörers kunskap genom Combitechs välutvecklade erfarenhetsutvecklingsprogram. Parallellt som du går det här tvååriga programmet gör du också konsultuppdrag i våra utvecklingsprojekt. På sikt kommer du vara en del i att forma vårt framtida tekniskt avancerade ledningsstödssystem för försvaret.**

**I ROLLEN**
------------


Som System Designer för våra radioprojekt får du möjlighet att arbeta med:  

* Designarbete för många olika radiotyper som finns eller kommer att finnas i Försvarsmakten.
* Kravspecificering och utvärdering till tester, verifiering och integration av systemlösningar och utbildning.
* Lösa avancerade tekniska problem för att hjälpa våra kunder att utveckla och förbättra deras system.
* Kommunicera effektivt med kund, leverantörer och andra intressenter.
* Efter driftsättning kommer du även att erbjuda teknisk assistans, driftstöd samt genomföra modifieringar/vidareutveckling.

Vi erbjuder teknisk expertkompetens, administrativt stöd och projektledning till våra kunder. Omfattningen av dessa uppgifter varierar beroende på projektets art och fas. Huvudfokus ligger på SDR, Software Define Radio, men även andra radiosystem förekommer då vi arbetar med både radiosystem från äldre modeller till nya som är under framtagning. Du kan komma att arbeta med frågor inom radio- och IP-kommunikation, vågutbredning eller antennteknik.


Du kommer att ingå i flera grupperingar som stöttar dig för att du ska få bästa möjliga förutsättningar. Tjänsteresor är en naturlig del av jobbet. Resor sker mestadels inom Sverige, men internationella resor kan förekomma.

**VI SÖKER DIG SOM**
--------------------

* Är Civil/Högskoleingenjör inom elektronik/RF/telekommunikation/antenndesign
* Är nyutexaminerad eller har några års erfarenhet inom relevant område
* Har god teknisk förståelse inom RF, Radioteknik, Vågutbredning, Antennteknik.
* Är strukturerad, initiativtagande och kommunikativ och trivs med att skapa ordning, bygga förtroende samt driva utveckling framåt.
* Har god kommunikationsförmåga, är utåtriktad och har förmågan att skapa kontakter och goda relationer.
* Arbetar metodiskt, målmedvetet, tar egna initiativ och har ett driv att utveckla dig själv och våra kunder.
* Är nyfiken som person, har en stark drivkraft och ett starkt engagemang för det du företar dig.
* Det är meriterande om du har branscherfarenhet från försvar, flyg eller industrinära utveckling
* Kan behärska det engelska språket väl i både tal och skrift.

**Då tjänsten innebär arbete som omfattas av försvarssekretess krävs det att du genomför och godkänns i en säkerhetsprövning med registerkontroll.**


Urval sker löpande. Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!

**KOM & GÖR SKILLNAD**
----------------------


Vi tror att man gör ett bättre jobb om man kan fokusera på rätt saker, därför gör vi det lätt att kombinera jobbet med vardagen. Vi satsar på våra medarbetare, de utgör kärnan, hjärnan och hjärtat i vår verksamhet. Dessutom står vi på en stadig grund av högteknologi, forskning och anställningstrygghet med försvars- och säkerhetskoncernen Saab som ägare.


För oss handlar det om hållbarhet - vi vill bli branschens mest hållbara företag; och för att vara ett hållbart företag i en hållbar framtid behöver vi investera i våra medarbetare. För oss är din återhämtning, dina utvecklingsmöjligheter och din trygghet lika viktigt som företagets framgång - utan våra medarbetare står vi stilla.


Vill du veta mer om hur det är att arbeta hos oss?


Kontaktperson/Rekryterande chef: emil.joelsson (@) combitech.com

title: Systems Engineer
description:
Since 1965, Stoneridge has designed and manufactured advanced, award-winning technologies including driveline and transmission actuation systems, vision systems, emissions control systems, safety systems, and security and monitoring systems for vehicle OEMs in the commercial vehicle, automotive, off-highway and agricultural vehicle markets. We’re focused on the areas of greatest market need – both today and tomorrow. Our core products and technologies are aligned with industry megatrends including safety and security, vehicle intelligence, fuel efficiency and emissions. Join the Stoneridge Team as we continue to build upon our strong history and reputation for quality products to deliver innovative products and systems that address a need, exceed our customers’ expectations, and motivate our team.

**Objective of the position**


In this role you will support IT systems, infrastructure, and applications used within the local organization and production environment. The position combines hands-on IT support with support and maintenance of manufacturing and production-related systems.


You will help ensure stable daily IT operations by supporting users, troubleshooting issues, monitoring systems, and maintaining connectivity between equipment and IT systems. The role also includes participation in smaller improvement and development activities related to reporting and system usability.


As part of the global IT organization, you will work together with both local teams and global IT colleagues.

**Characterization of activities**

* Provide day-to-day IT support for users, hardware, software, infrastructure, and connected systems
* Troubleshoot and maintain IT and production-related systems, including PCs, servers, networks, printers, and manufacturing applications
* Support production operations by monitoring systems, maintaining connectivity, and assisting with traceability and reporting solutions
* Participate in system improvements, smaller development activities, and implementation of technical solutions to improve operations
* Collaborate with local teams and the global IT organization to ensure stable, efficient, and user-friendly IT services

**Education, Experience and Knowledge**

* MSc or BSc in Electronics, Computer Science, or equivalent experience
* 2+ years of experience in industrial environments (programming, IT systems, production engineering)
* Strong proficiency in English (professional level)
* Service-oriented mindset with strong collaboration skills
* Demonstrated innovation and creative problem-solving abilities
* Proactive and adaptable approach to technical and operational challenges

**What we offer (Sweden)**

* You will be welcomed to a Fun, Diverse and Inclusive workplace, where we base our culture on our Core Values: (Integrity, Customer orientation, Teamwork, Adaptability, Accountability and Social responsibility).
* Opportunity for personal and professional growth in a fast‑growing, constantly evolving organization
* A central role in shaping the future within a multinational automotive technology company focusing on safety and security
* Competitive salary based on knowledge and experience


Interested? Please apply to this position using the above link or contact Lucian.morariu@stoneridge.com for more information about this position.
company_description: Stoneridge is #MovingMobilityForward. Our technologies enable safe and efficient mobility, and we will continue to do our part to drive positive, widespread change through our innovative systems.

title: Mechanical Design Engineer - Wave Energy
description:
Working at CorPower Ocean you will be part of a world-class team, determined to make a big impact. We are on a mission to bring reliable and competitive wave energy to the world. We offer a high degree of autonomy and flexibility, combined with great personal responsibility. CorPower Ocean is a global leader in wave energy, with a technology that has shown game-changing performance. Your work will contribute to the global transition to renewable energy by unlocking one of the largest untapped sources of clean energy on earth.
  
  

The Role
  
We are seeking a mechanical design engineer with industrial equipment experience to develop and optimise our wave energy converters. You will be part of the mechanical team and collaborate across engineering, manufacturing, testing, supply chain and field operations.
  
  

Responsibilities
  
* Design of mechanical structures and mechanisms from concept to release-for-production
* Perform structural analysis (hand calculation and FEA)
* Present to cross-disciplinary stakeholders during design reviews
* Produce technical documentation for internal use and third-party verification/certification
* Perform failure mode, effects and criticality analysis (FMECA) at module level
* Manage your modules and components to meet performance, schedule and cost targets
* Investigate new solutions to improve performance, manufacturability and reliability
* Interface with engineering, supply chain, manufacturing and field-testing teams
* Support and coach more junior engineers
* Support assembly, testing, and pilot installations in the field


Skills and Software
  
* You have 5+ years of relevant experience from designing mechanical systems & industrial equipment
* You have proven end-to-end development - design, build, test and release - across multiple projects
* You have a broad technical knowledge and genuine interest in the different aspects of machinery and mechanical design. Knowledge of mooring, gearbox technology, pneumatics, hydraulics, structural optimization, fabrication, sensors, and/or electricity generation equipment is qualifying.
* You have experience working with Creo CAD, Windchill PLM and ANSYS for structural analysis (or equivalent tools with willingness to get up to speed)
* You may have a BSc or a MSc. degree in mechanical engineering or related disciplines, but your personality, experience and interest in the field is the most important.
* You are proficient in English, both spoken and written


**As a person:**  

* You are striving for excellence, put quality into everything you do
* You are self-motivated and love to optimize your time
* You always search for simple and elegant solutions to difficult problems
* You love to learn new things, and take pride in constantly developing your skills
* You are persistent, knowing it takes stamina to reach pioneering goals
* You see your tasks through to completion
* You are comfortable in presenting your solutions internally and externally
* You adapt to change and update decisions as evidence evolves
* You are data driven and strive to always back your points with solid analysis

title: Aerospace Systems Engineer - Design
description:
**Scope:** Full Time, Employed


**Model:** Fully Onsite


**Salary:** As Per Industry Norm


**Industry:** Aerospace


**Daily Responsibilities**

* Design and modify avionics and cabin systems, including ECS, heating, cooling, humidification, soundproofing, oxygen, smoke detection, and water/waste systems
* Adapt primary and secondary structures and interior furnishings to support these changes
* Assist the team lead with organizational and administrative duties
* Apply certification standards, regulatory requirements, and compliance methods throughout the design process
* Communicate effectively with internal teams and external partners to ensure smooth project execution

 **Qualifications:**

* Aeronautical Engineering Degree
* 4+ years working experience in the Aerospace industry
* Fluent English
* Proficiency in design software (AutoCad, CATIA, 2D/3D)
* Expert designing systems modifications focusing on:
	+ ECS, heating, cooling, humidification, soundproofing, oxygen, smoke detection, and water/waste systems

*Please note: Due to the high volume of applications, only candidates with aerospace systems design experience will be contacted.*

title: Product Engineer
description:
You know that bit where every company says they’re
 *“changing the world”* 
 ? Yeah, it can feel a little forced. But we like to think our story actually has some realness to it.
   

  

 Our story begins with
 **Shadi Bitar** 
 and
 **Ninos Malki** 
 , who came to Sweden from Syria as kids and discovered that books could be a bridge - helping them learn the language, understand the culture, and explore new worlds.
   

  

 A thought emerged,
 *what if everyone could have that?* 
 And just like that, Nextory was born - your all-access pass to read, listen, and discover new perspectives without limits.
   

  

 And now, we're on a quest to find a
 **Product Engineer.**
**Let Us Tell You About The Role 📖**
 As a Product Engineer at Nextory, you will be involved throughout the entire product development journey - from early ideas and problem discovery to implementation, launch, and continuous improvement. We’re shifting from traditional development roles towards engineers who take ownership, think holistically, and contribute far beyond writing code.
   

  

**We believe that the future of software engineering is more about authoring intent than writing lines of code.**
 You will work across the stack with a focus on backend development, distributed systems, integrations, and scalable architecture. Just as importantly, you’ll collaborate closely with relevant stakeholders to shape solutions that create real value for our users.
   

  

**The main character we’re looking for 👀**
 We believe you are a curious and product-minded engineer who enjoys solving complex problems and building scalable, high-quality systems. You thrive in collaborative environments and are just as comfortable collaborating with humans as you are working alongside AI-powered tools, agents and workflows to scale your own impact.
   

  

**Furthermore, We Believe You Have**
* MSc, BSc in Computer Science or another relevant field, or equivalent work experience.
* Around 5 years or more experience working with backend development
* A strong understanding of distributed systems, microservices patterns, and how to build for scalability and resilience.


**These are a few of the technologies we work with.**
 Backend: Java
   

  

 Cloud & Infrastructure: Google Cloud Platform, Kubernetes, Docker, Terraform
   

  

 Databases, Caching & Messaging: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Kafka
   

  

 While solid Java experience is strongly preferred, we don’t expect you to have experience with everything else that we’re using. We care more about having strong engineering fundamentals and a curiosity to learn.
   

  

**The Nextory way of working 🏠**
 At Nextory, we believe a strong and inclusive culture is key to our success and that culture flourishes when we meet and collaborate in person as much as possible. That’s why we spend the majority of the working time at our beautiful office!
   

  

 We are based in Stockholm, Sweden, with offices in Paris and Bangalore. Our hybrid work policy includes four days in the office and Wednesdays as a work-from-home day.
   

  

**Your next story starts here 💫**
 We look forward to your application. Applications are reviewed continuously. If you have any questions about the role, please contact Erika Thorslund,
 *Talent Acquisition* 
 , erika.thorslund@nextory.com
   

  

*Please note that we do not offer relocation and that a six-month probationary period applies.*

title: SVT söker fullstackutvecklare
description:
**Vad Vi Erbjuder Dig**
 På SVTi utvecklar vi de publika digitala tjänster som SVT erbjuder. Vårt mål är att vara en av de mest inkluderande och inspirerande arbetsplatserna inom medieteknik. Vi tror på autonoma, agila team med friheten att själva välja arbetssätt och verktyg för att lösa uppgiften på bästa sätt. Som en del av vårt Marketing Automation-team blir du en viktig del av ett engagerat team som arbetar för att öka återkommande användning av SVT Play. Det gör vi genom att skapa relevanta och smarta upplevelser både inom och utanför tjänsten.
   

  

**Vad Tjänsten Innebär**
 I rollen som fullstackutvecklare kommer du att arbeta med att utveckla och implementera vår marketing automation-plattform. Du kommer att bidra till förbättrade kundresor, rekommendationer och göra data från digital marknadsföring mer tillgänglig för hela SVT. Vi utforskar också hur vi kan ge publiken bättre, mer träffsäkra rekommendationer – och därmed öka deras vilja att komma tillbaka till SVT Play och experimenterar kontinuerligt med nya idéer och lösningar för att nå våra mål.
   

  

**Vem Vi Tror Att Du Är**
 Du har förmåga att ta egna initiativ och driva utveckling framåt. Du arbetar strukturerat och trivs med att omsätta idéer till praktiska lösningar. Du har en analytisk förmåga som hjälper dig att ta dig an komplexa tekniska problem metodiskt och lösningsorienterat. Samtidigt är du lyhörd och pragmatisk, men också nyfiken och engagerad i att förbättra både produkter och arbetssätt. Att arbeta agilt är ett arbetssätt du uppskattar, och du trivs i samarbeten med både tekniska och icke-tekniska kollegor. Du kommunicerar tydligt och bidrar till ett öppet och inkluderande teamklimat.
   

  

**Vi Söker Dig Som Har**
* gedigen erfarenhet av JavaScript (React, Node.js,), Golang och andra relevanta teknologier.
* erfarenhet av databashantering (SQL).
* förståelse för och erfarenhet av att arbeta med API:er, mikrotjänster, eventdriven-arkitektur och integrationer.
* erfarenhet av att arbeta i agila team och med verktyg som Trello, Shortcut eller liknande.
* god kommunikationsförmåga och förmåga att arbeta både på egen hand och i team.
* erfarenhet av att använda AI-stöd i utvecklingsprocessen, med fokus på kvalitet, tydliga krav, säkerhet och mänsklig granskning
* en genuin nyfikenhet och trivs i miljöer där tekniken rör sig fort
* vana att kommunicera öppet, dela idéer, ställa frågor och ge konstruktiv feedback.


**Hur Du Ansöker**
 I den här rekryteringsprocessen använder vi urvalsfrågor och CV, du behöver alltså inte skicka med ett personligt brev. Det gör vi för att säkerställa att rekryteringen blir kompetensbaserad och effektiv och att vi får samma viktiga information av alla kandidater. Välkommen med din ansökan senast 2026-06-07. Intervjuer sker löpande.
   

  

**Annat Som Är Bra Att Veta**
 Vi sitter i SVT-huset vid Gärdet i Stockholm och jobbar hybrid utifrån vad som passar teamet och samarbetet bäst, i dagsläget 3 dagar i veckan på kontoret. Tjänsten är en tillsvidareanställning på heltid.
   

  

 Om du har några frågor är du välkommen att kontakta gruppchef Jenny Wester jenny.wester@svt.se. Facklig information lämnas av Fanny Lindhé (SACO), Maria Nassikas (Unionen) och Jane Andersson (SJF). Samtliga nås via växeln, tfn 08-784 00 00.
   

  

 Välkommen med din ansökan!
